name: Drawer
description: DrawerHeader (Basic/Left-Icon x Small/Large, title+description, dismiss, optional Link Button, count badge, bottom divider) and DrawerFooter (Stretch/Basic/Checkbox/Toggle/Stepper/Link Button, each pairing Cancel+Continue actions).
sourceNote: DrawerFooter's Checkbox type reuses CheckboxLabel; its Toggle type introduced a new Switch primitive (not previously in the codebase — no standalone Figma frame existed for it, only an inline raster reference). Footer Cancel/Continue buttons use Button(neutral/stroke) and Button(primary/filled) at size='sm', matching the precedent set by DatePicker's footer rather than the slightly larger padding shown in the raw Figma trace.

leading.description: Icon slot for the left-icon type — defaults to a history icon

checked.description: Controls the checkbox (checkbox type) or switch (toggle type)

activeStep.description: 1-indexed active dot out of 3, stepper type
